Class DiscussionReply

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.DiscussionReply
public class DiscussionReply extends Object

Title: DiscussionReply Class

Description: Represents a reply to a DiscussionPost. Replies are text-only and belong to exactly one parent post. A reply may be marked as the accepted answer via the isAccepted flag.

Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025

Version:
1.00 2026-06-22 Initial version, 2.00 2026-06-23 Added isAccepted field for unified board
Author:
Weiye (Richard) Zhang

  • Constructor Details

    • DiscussionReply

      public DiscussionReply(int id, int postId, String author, String body, String createdAt, boolean read)

      Method: DiscussionReply

      Description: Full constructor used by Database.getRepliesForPost().

      Parameters:
      id - specifies the primary key from the replies table
      postId - specifies the FK to the parent post
      author - specifies the username of the replier
      body - specifies the reply text
      createdAt - specifies the timestamp string from H2
      isAccepted - specifies whether this reply has been marked as the accepted answer
